messages.content:
# Want to have it Rain while you play Assetto Corsa? Follow this guide!
# ⚠️ Paid $$$ mod ⚠️

## Step 1
> Become a Patreon of Ilja Jusupov aka x4fab ($1 USD)
> https://www.patreon.com/x4fab

## Step 3
> Drag and drop the file into content manager, install the file and close and re open CM

## Step 4
> Go to **Settings > Custom Shader Patch > Rain FX** and enable rain.

## Step 5
> **You cannot toggle Rain while online, you will have to wait for the server to change.**
